label: source_file
description: Source document filename or identifier used to trace each extracted row back to the input file.

label: study_system
description: Overall catalytic system or reaction family discussed in the document.

label: reaction_name
description: Named reaction or process. Use concise wording and verify terminology manually.

label: feedstock
description: Main reactant or feedstock. Preserve chemical names as written and verify abbreviations.

label: co_feed
description: Additional reactant, carrier gas, co-reactant, or diluent if reported.

label: catalyst
description: Catalyst name, composition, or sample code as reported by the document.

label: catalyst_composition
description: Elemental composition, loading, support, promoter, or formulation details when available.

label: catalyst_preparation_method
description: Catalyst synthesis or pretreatment method. Summarize briefly and verify conditions manually.

label: reactor_type
description: Reactor type such as fixed bed, batch reactor, flow reactor, membrane reactor, or microreactor.

label: reaction_temperature_c
description: Reaction temperature in Celsius. Use numeric values when possible and verify unit conversions manually.

label: reaction_pressure_mpa
description: Reaction pressure in MPa. Convert units only when the conversion is clear and manually checked.

label: space_velocity
description: Space velocity or residence-time condition, including units such as h^-1 when reported.

label: reaction_time_h
description: Reaction time or time on stream in hours when available.

label: conversion_percent
description: Conversion of the main feedstock in percent. Check whether conversion basis is defined.

label: selectivity_percent
description: Selectivity to target product in percent. Confirm product basis before use.

label: yield_percent
description: Yield of target product in percent. Verify whether it is calculated or directly reported.

label: main_product
description: Main product or target product extracted from the reported reaction results.

label: byproducts
description: Important byproducts or product distribution notes when available.

label: carbon_balance_percent
description: Carbon balance in percent if reported. Treat missing or unclear values cautiously.

label: data_source_location
description: Location of the extracted value, such as abstract, table, figure, caption, or supporting text.

label: notes
description: Short caveats about units, ambiguity, missing values, or manual review needs.
